Our Story

Where the mountains meet the sea

In the heart of Sayulita, beneath the shade of an ancient tree, Julia created a place where chocolate is tempered by hand, coffee is pulled with care, and every cake tells a story.

Everything is made from scratch using organic, free-range, and locally sourced ingredients. Our cookies and cakes are crafted with almond flour. Naturally sweet. Gluten free. No shortcuts.

Come visit us
What We Make

Chocolate, coffee & Pastries

Chocolate

Hand-tempered artisan chocolate made with premium Mexican cacao. Truffles, bonbons, and bars crafted in small batches.

Coffee

Specialty espresso drinks and pour-overs using locally roasted beans. Latte art, Mexican hot chocolate, and cold brew.

Cakes & Pastries

Sourdough cookies, berry tartlets, lemon muffins, and custom celebration cakes. Made with almond flour. Gluten free, naturally sweet.

Find Us

Visit Julia's

We're located in the heart of Sayulita, Nayarit, Mexico. Look for the mountain-and-palm logo on the glass doors, right off the main street.
